title: XE Palette Knife Baking – Stainless Steel Offset Cake Spatula, Professional Icing Spatula for Cake Decorating, Smoothing Icing, Frosting & Pastries - Ideal for Kitchen, Home & Bakery
features: BUILT FOR ANYONE AND EVERYONE: The simplicity and effectiveness of this icing spatula make it a must-have for anyone who enjoys baking and wants to create beautifully decorated desserts. This versatile spatula is perfect for use in both home and professional bakeries.

ENHANCED CONTROL AND PRECISION: Angled Spatula has a design specifically shaped to an offset angle which helps keep your hand clear of the cake's surface and provides better control and precision during decorating. The baking spatula's bendy shape also comes in handy for carrying and cutting multiple desserts.

CONVENIENT ANTI-SLIP WOODEN HANDLE: This non-slip Spatula consists of a durable and resistant wooden handle which provides strong and comfortable grip. Cake Spatula also contains 2 rivet system which promises exceptional control and balance while also reducing the overall.

TOP-NOTCH STAINLESS STEEL: Baking Spatula is made up of impenetrable and anti-rust stainless steel which is sturdy enough to withstand a great deal of pressure. Frosting Spatula consists of smooth edges and curved shape that has a wide range of practical and culinary applications.

MULTIPURPOSE CREATION: This pallet Spatula contains a sleek surface which is ideal when dealing with cakes of all sizes. Spatula can also be used to perform icing and glazing duties on different types of desserts such as layer cakes, sheet cakes, cheesecakes, cupcakes, brownies, cookies, crepes, tarts, pies, pastries and dessert bars.
